name: StarDist
description: Deep-learning-based 2D/3D nucleus and object detection using star-convex polygons. Ideal for segmenting round or roughly convex objects such as cell nuclei in fluorescence microscopy images.

name: Trainable Weka Segmentation
description: Machine-learning-based pixel classification tool for interactive segmentation. Users paint examples of different classes and the classifier learns to segment the whole image. Supports 2D and 3D images.

name: MorphoLibJ
description: Collection of mathematical morphology tools and plugins for ImageJ. Includes morphological filtering, watershed segmentation, geodesic distance transform, label image operations, and region analysis.

name: TrackMate
description: Single-particle tracking tool for fluorescence microscopy. Detects spots, links them over time to build tracks, and provides quantitative motion analysis. Supports multiple detectors and trackers.

name: CLIJ2
description: GPU-accelerated image processing library using OpenCL. Provides fast implementations of common operations like filtering, thresholding, labeling, and measurements on the GPU.

name: BioVoxxel Toolbox
description: Collection of tools for biological image analysis including extended particle analyzer, watershed variants, neighborhood analysis, binary feature extractor, and speckle inspector.

name: BigStitcher
description: Tool for alignment and fusion of large multi-tile, multi-angle, multi-channel microscopy datasets. Handles terabyte-scale datasets with interest point-based registration.

name: BoneJ
description: Plugin suite for bone image analysis. Includes tools for measuring bone thickness, connectivity, anisotropy, and fractal dimension from micro-CT images.

name: Bio-Formats
description: Library for reading and writing life sciences image file formats. Supports over 150 formats including proprietary microscopy formats (Zeiss, Leica, Nikon, Olympus, etc.).

name: Labkit
description: Intuitive interactive pixel classification and segmentation tool. Uses random forest classifier with fast GPU-accelerated preview for labeling 2D and 3D images.

name: LimeSeg
description: 3D segmentation plugin based on surface evolution with superellipsoids. Designed for segmenting cells in 3D fluorescence microscopy images, especially epithelial tissues.

name: SNT
description: Semi-automated neuron tracing and analysis framework. Traces neurons in 2D/3D, performs Sholl analysis, and supports SWC format for neuronal morphology reconstruction.

name: Coloc 2
description: Colocalization analysis plugin providing multiple statistical methods including Pearson's, Manders', Li's ICQ, Costes' auto-threshold, and significance testing via image randomization.

name: 3D ImageJ Suite
description: Comprehensive 3D image processing suite including 3D segmentation (iterative thresholding, spot segmentation), 3D filtering, 3D measurements, and 3D ROI manager.

name: FeatureJ
description: Feature detection and extraction tools based on image derivatives. Includes edge detection (Canny), Hessian-based feature detection, Laplacian, and structure tensor computation.

name: DeconvolutionLab2
description: Deconvolution plugin implementing multiple algorithms (Richardson-Lucy, Tikhonov-Miller, Landweber, ICTM, etc.) for restoring microscopy images using measured or synthetic PSFs.

name: Cellpose Wrapper
description: ImageJ wrapper for Cellpose deep-learning cell segmentation. Provides access to Cellpose's generalist cell and nucleus segmentation models directly from Fiji.

name: ilastik Import Export
description: Bridge between Fiji and ilastik for pixel and object classification workflows. Allows exporting images from Fiji to ilastik and importing ilastik results back.

name: CSBDeep / N2V
description: Deep-learning-based image restoration including CARE (Content-Aware Image Restoration) and Noise2Void self-supervised denoising. Restores noisy, low-SNR microscopy images.

name: EGT - Easy Graph Tool
description: Graph-based analysis plugin for creating and analyzing graphs from images. Useful for analyzing vascular networks, neuronal arbors, and other branching structures.

name: AnalyzeSkeleton
description: Analyzes 2D/3D skeleton images to extract branch information. Calculates number of branches, junctions, end points, average branch length, and provides detailed branch data.

name: Skeletonize3D
description: Generates 3D skeleton representations from binary images using medial surface/axis thinning. Prerequisite for AnalyzeSkeleton for analyzing tubular or branching structures.

name: TurboReg / StackReg
description: Image registration plugins for aligning image stacks. TurboReg performs subpixel registration of pairs of images; StackReg aligns time series using rigid body, affine, or bilinear transforms.

name: Elastix Wrapper
description: Fiji wrapper for the elastix registration toolkit. Provides access to intensity-based image registration with B-spline deformable and rigid/affine transforms for 2D and 3D images.

name: bUnwarpJ
description: Elastic/consistent image registration plugin using B-spline deformations. Performs simultaneous registration of source and target images with regularization constraints.

name: Correct 3D Drift
description: Corrects sample drift in 3D timelapse sequences using phase correlation. Aligns frames by cross-correlation to compensate for XYZ drift over time.

name: ClearVolume
description: Real-time GPU-based volume rendering plugin for Fiji. Provides interactive 3D visualization of volumetric datasets with transfer function editing and multi-channel support.

name: 3Dscript
description: Create 3D animations of volumetric image data using a natural-language-like scripting interface. Renders smooth animations with customizable camera, lighting, and rendering modes.

name: BigDataViewer
description: Interactive viewer for large multi-resolution 3D image datasets. Supports arbitrary slicing, multi-source overlay, and HDF5/N5/Zarr backends for terabyte-scale data.

name: SciView
description: 3D visualization tool for scientific data in Fiji using the scenery rendering library. Supports meshes, volumes, point clouds, and VR headsets for immersive visualization.

name: OMERO Insight
description: Integration between Fiji and OMERO image management server. Browse, import, and export images between Fiji and OMERO for centralized image data management.

name: HDF5 Plugin
description: Read and write HDF5 files in Fiji. Supports importing and exporting large image datasets in the HDF5 hierarchical data format commonly used in scientific computing.

name: N5 Viewer
description: Plugin for reading N5, Zarr, and HDF5 datasets in Fiji via BigDataViewer. Supports multi-scale pyramid datasets for efficient visualization of large images.

name: QuPath Extension
description: Bridge between Fiji and QuPath for whole slide image analysis. Transfer ROIs, annotations, and images between Fiji and QuPath digital pathology workflows.

name: Non-Local Means Denoising
description: Implementation of the Non-Local Means denoising algorithm for 2D and 3D images. Removes noise while preserving edges and fine structural details.

name: Rolling Ball Background Subtraction
description: Built-in ImageJ tool for subtracting uneven illumination background. Uses a rolling ball algorithm with configurable radius to correct for non-uniform background intensity.

name: Auto Local Threshold
description: Collection of local thresholding methods including Bernsen, Contrast, Mean, Median, MidGrey, Niblack, Otsu, Phansalkar, and Sauvola. Essential for segmenting images with uneven illumination.

name: Auto Threshold
description: Collection of global thresholding methods including Otsu, Huang, Li, Yen, Triangle, MaxEntropy, RenyiEntropy, and more. Provides 16+ automatic threshold algorithms.

name: Fiji Ridge Detection
description: Detects ridges and lines in images using steerable filters. Extracts curvilinear structures like filaments, blood vessels, neurites, and fibers with sub-pixel accuracy.

name: DiReFil
description: Quantitative analysis of fiber direction and fiber radius from microscopy images. Useful for analyzing collagen, cytoskeleton, and other fibrous structures.

name: OrientationJ
description: Plugin for analyzing local orientation and coherence in images. Computes orientation maps, coherence maps, and distribution of orientations for fibrous or textured structures.

name: FracLac
description: Fractal analysis plugin for ImageJ. Computes fractal dimension, lacunarity, and multifractal spectrum for analyzing self-similar and complex morphological patterns.

name: Shape Filter
description: Filters connected components in binary images based on shape descriptors like area, circularity, elongation, solidity, and more. Useful for post-segmentation object selection.

name: Measure Stack
description: Measures intensity statistics across all slices in an image stack. Generates per-slice measurements including mean, min, max, standard deviation, and integrated density.

name: BIOP Plugin Collection
description: Collection of utilities from the BioImaging and Optics Platform. Includes Cellpose wrapper, elastix wrapper, ABBA atlas tool, and various convenience utilities for microscopy.

name: CLIJ Assistant
description: Interactive GUI for building GPU-accelerated image processing workflows. Records operations as scripts (Groovy, Python, etc.) for reproducible GPU processing pipelines.

name: Script Editor Autocompletion
description: Adds code autocompletion and documentation popups to the Fiji Script Editor. Supports Java, Groovy, Python, and other scripting languages used in ImageJ.

name: ActionBar
description: Creates custom toolbar buttons in Fiji that run macros, scripts, or plugins. Useful for creating simplified interfaces for routine workflows.

name: JACoP
description: Just Another Colocalization Plugin. Provides Pearson's coefficient, overlap coefficients, Manders' coefficients, Costes' randomization, Van Steensel's CCF, and cytofluorogram.

name: Colocalization Threshold
description: Performs pixel-based colocalization with automatic threshold determination using Costes' method. Generates scatterplots, colocalized pixel maps, and statistical coefficients.

name: CellCounter
description: Manual cell counting tool with multiple counters. Allows marking and counting objects in images with different categories, exporting counts and positions.

name: Find Maxima / Find Foci
description: Detects local intensity maxima in images for counting bright spots. Find Foci extends this with advanced peak detection for fluorescence spot counting.

name: Watershed Irregular Features
description: Advanced watershed segmentation for separating touching irregular-shaped objects. Better than standard watershed for non-round objects like elongated cells or tissue regions.

name: Local Thickness
description: Computes local thickness maps of binary structures. For each foreground pixel, calculates the diameter of the largest sphere that fits within the structure at that point.

name: Descriptor-based Series Registration
description: Registration of image series based on corresponding descriptor points. Uses RANSAC-based matching for robust alignment of 2D and 3D images over time.

name: MTrack2
description: Multi-object tracking plugin for brightfield and fluorescence timelapse sequences. Tracks objects by nearest-neighbor linking between frames.

name: Manual Tracking
description: Manual point-and-click tracking of objects over time. Generates tracks with XY coordinates per frame and computes velocity and distance measurements.

name: Stitching
description: Pairwise and grid stitching for 2D and 3D image tiles. Computes optimal tile positions using phase correlation and creates seamless mosaic images with blending.

name: IJ-OpenCV
description: Bridge between ImageJ and OpenCV for advanced computer vision operations. Enables using OpenCV algorithms (feature matching, contour detection, etc.) from within Fiji.

name: Results to Excel
description: Exports ImageJ Results tables directly to Excel (.xlsx) format. Preserves all measurement data, formatting, and supports batch export of multiple tables.

name: Read and Write Excel
description: Read data from and write data to Excel files directly in ImageJ. Supports .xlsx format for importing reference data and exporting analysis results.

name: Versatile Wand
description: Enhanced magic wand tool that selects connected regions based on intensity, gradient, or color criteria. More flexible than the built-in wand with configurable tolerance.

name: Sholl Analysis
description: Quantitative analysis of neuronal arbor morphology using the Sholl method. Counts intersections of neuronal processes with concentric circles/spheres at increasing radii from the soma.
